name: Juice Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the unsweetened pineapple juice or chosen juice into ice cube trays.
2. Freeze the cubes as you would regular ice cubes.
3. Use juice cubes in iced tea, mineral water, lemonade, wine coolers, and other beverages for an intriguing tart-sweet flavor.
Warning: Do not use aggressive culinary slang such as "kill the heat" or "burn". Instead, turn off the stove when cooking is complete.
